title: 5 Takeaways From Q1's EV Sales In The U.S.
content: Electric car sales fell considerably in the first quarter. Here are some trends to look out for, and what might happen next.

title: BMW Group’s Global EV Sales Crater 20% As U.S. Market Cools Off
content: The new iX3 is hugely successful in Europe, but it wasn’t enough to offset the big declines recorded in China and the U.S.
